channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: BJP Accuses Congress of Discrediting Election Commission, Cites Former PM Manmohan Singh
item.description: The BJP has accused the Congress party of having a habitual tendency to discredit the Election Commission of India (EC), citing former Prime Minister Manmohan Singh's remarks about the EC's pain over ...

item.title: Manny Pacquiao's Team Plans Exhibition Fight for Later This Year
item.description: The camp of legendary boxer Manny Pacquiao is reportedly considering organizing an exhibition fight later in 2026, according to a news article published by ABS-CBN on July 14, 2026. The announcement c...

item.title: Manitoba First Nation Faces Emergency Response Challenges Amid Wildfire Crisis
item.description: The O-Pipon-Na-Piwin Cree Nation in northern Manitoba is grappling with the aftermath of wildfires that have displaced hundreds of residents and exposed critical gaps in emergency preparedness. While ...

item.title: New Zealand's healthcare system faces corporate ownership shifts with implications for patient care
item.description: New Zealand's health system is undergoing significant changes with the passage of the Healthy Futures (Pae Ora) Amendment Act, which prioritises 'timely access to quality healthcare' over previous Māo...

item.title: Assam repatriates over 1,600 illegal Bangladeshis under legal framework in two years
item.description: Assam Chief Minister Himanta Biswa Sarma announced that 1,679 illegal Bangladeshis have been repatriated to their home country over the past two years, as per the Immigrants (Expulsion from Assam) Act...

item.title: Oil Prices Surge Over 9% Amid U.S.-Iran Tensions in Strait of Hormuz
item.description: President Donald Trump's decision to reimpose a naval blockade against Iran has triggered a significant surge in global oil prices, with Brent crude futures rising over 9% to $83.30 per barrel—the lar...

item.title: Tanzania Warns Against Online Fraud as Cyber Threats Rise
item.description: Online fraud has become a major threat in Tanzania as scammers use digital platforms to target individuals and businesses. Cybercriminals employ tactics like phishing emails, fake investment schemes, ...

item.title: Joyang shares strategy behind ₱500K win on Kapamilya Deal or No Deal
item.description: The article discusses Joyang's recent victory on the Philippine television game show "Kapamilya Deal or No Deal", where she secured a ₱500,000 prize. While the original title sensationalizes the win b...

item.title: US Efforts to Dismantle International Criminal Court Threat
item.description: The Trump administration is pursuing measures to isolate the International Criminal Court (ICC), including sanctions, travel bans, and diplomatic pressure, to counter what it calls threats to US sover...

item.title: Severe West Nile Virus Case in Los Angeles Amid Rising National Outbreak
item.description: The Los Angeles County Department of Public Health confirmed the first case of West Nile virus in 2026, involving a hospitalized individual with West Nile virus encephalitis, a rare and severe complic...

item.title: KKR pursues $5.8 billion Steadfast Group acquisition
item.description: Private equity giant KKR is actively pursuing ASX-listed Steadfast Group, collaborating with US insurance distribution firm Amwins and bid partner Dragoneer Investment Group to take the $5.8 billion i...

item.title: ICPC probe faces scrutiny as DG calls for independent inquiry into Gbajabiamila case
item.description: Prince Ademola Adeniyi, claimed DG of the controversial Presidential Foreign Intervention Promotion Council (PFIPC), has expressed doubts about the integrity of the Independent Corrupt Practices Commi...

item.title: China Condemns Japan's Space Militarization and Neo-Militarism Concerns
item.description: China has expressed serious concerns over Japan's accelerated space militarisation following the amendment to Japan's Ministry of Defense Establishment Act. The amendment, passed by Japan's House of C...

item.title: Ukraine's drone attacks disrupt Russia's energy infrastructure
item.description: Ukrainian drone strikes have caused significant damage to Russian oil facilities, leading to fires and evacuations. The attacks targeted key infrastructure in southern Russia, including the Ilsky oil ...

item.title: Baguio Commemorates 10th Anniversary of West Philippine Sea Arbitral Ruling
item.description: Baguio City commemorated the 10th anniversary of the 2016 Hague arbitral ruling that rejected China's South China Sea claims, including areas in the West Philippine Sea. The event included a military-...

item.title: Trump criticizes media for alleged bias in Iran war coverage
item.description: President Donald Trump accused the media of attempting to undermine the United States' military campaign against Iran during an interview with Hugh Hewitt. He specifically criticized The New York Time...

item.title: Twelve Arrested in Connection with Alleged Right-Wing Terror Threat to Islamic Event
item.description: Twelve individuals have been arrested in connection with an alleged right-wing terror threat to an Islamic event at a country estate in Suffolk. Counter Terrorism Policing (CTP) confirmed the investig...

item.title: Governor Fintiri's Approach to Effective Governance and Resource Management
item.description: Governor Ahmadu Umaru Fintiri's administration in Adamawa State has focused on strategic resource management to drive development. Since taking office in 2019, the government has prioritized essential...

item.title: Justice Department shares Minneapolis shooting evidence with state authorities
item.description: The Trump administration has shared long-withheld evidence related to three shootings by immigration officers in Minneapolis, Minnesota, with local authorities. This development comes after months of ...

item.title: South Australia proposes banning sex offenders from dating apps to enhance online safety
item.description: South Australia is set to implement a groundbreaking policy that would ban domestic violence perpetrators and sex offenders from using dating apps, aiming to protect users from potential harm. The pro...
